allow: PowerShell($start = Get-Date; Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10 | Out-Null; $elapsed = \(Get-Date\) - $start; Write-Output "Second request: $\($elapsed.TotalMilliseconds\)ms")

PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Windows.Forms; Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500; $screen = [System.Windows.Forms.Screen]::PrimaryScreen.Bounds; $bmp = New-Object System.Drawing.Bitmap\($screen.Width, $screen.Height\); $g = [System.Drawing.Graphics]::FromImage\($bmp\); $g.CopyFromScreen\($screen.Location, [System.Drawing.Point]::Empty, $screen.Size\); $path = "$env:TEMP\\antigravity_screenshot.png"; $bmp.Save\($path\); $g.Dispose\(\); $bmp.Dispose\(\); Write-Output "Saved to $path")

PowerShell(Start-Process "msedge" -ArgumentList "http://localhost:3000"; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Windows.Forms; Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; $screen = [System.Windows.Forms.Screen]::PrimaryScreen.Bounds; $bmp = New-Object System.Drawing.Bitmap\($screen.Width, $screen.Height\); $g = [System.Drawing.Graphics]::FromImage\($bmp\); $g.CopyFromScreen\($screen.Location, [System.Drawing.Point]::Empty, $screen.Size\); $path = "$env:TEMP\\antigravity_dash.png"; $bmp.Save\($path\); $g.Dispose\(\); $bmp.Dispose\(\); Write-Output "Saved to $path")
PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($r\) { $r.StatusCode } else { "Server not responding" })

PowerShell(Start-Process "msedge" -ArgumentList "http://localhost:3000/team/40?league=39&season=2025"; Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Windows.Forms, System.Drawing; $s = [System.Windows.Forms.Screen]::PrimaryScreen.Bounds; $bmp = New-Object System.Drawing.Bitmap\($s.Width, $s.Height\); $g = [System.Drawing.Graphics]::FromImage\($bmp\); $g.CopyFromScreen\($s.Location, [System.Drawing.Point]::Empty, $s.Size\); $p = "$env:TEMP\\team_page.png"; $bmp.Save\($p\); $g.Dispose\(\); $bmp.Dispose\(\); Write-Output $p)

PowerShell(Start-Process "msedge" -ArgumentList "http://localhost:3000"; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Windows.Forms, System.Drawing; $s = [System.Windows.Forms.Screen]::PrimaryScreen.Bounds; $bmp = New-Object System.Drawing.Bitmap\($s.Width, $s.Height\); $g = [System.Drawing.Graphics]::FromImage\($bmp\); $g.CopyFromScreen\($s.Location, [System.Drawing.Point]::Empty, $s.Size\); $p = "$env:TEMP\\home_final.png"; $bmp.Save\($p\); $g.Dispose\(\); $bmp.Dispose\(\); Write-Output $p)
